title: Wriggler
move_pattern: If summoned mid-combat (StartStunned=true), begins with Spawned (stun/pass). Otherwise starts with an INIT_MOVE that picks based on slot position: odd-numbered slots (wriggler1, wriggler3) begin with Nasty Bite; even-numbered slots (wriggler2, wriggler4) begin with Wriggle. Afterward, alternates between Nasty Bite and Wriggle indefinitely.
notes: The Wriggler can be summoned mid-combat by other monsters. When spawned this way, StartStunned=true and it passes its first turn with a stun intent before cycling normally. The Wriggle move both grants the Wriggler 2 Strength and adds 1 Infection status card to the player's discard pile. When multiple Wigglers appear together, their staggered slot assignments ensure they take different moves each turn. Note: the provided localization includes keys for PARASITIZE_PLAYER and WRIGGLE_STRIKE that do not correspond to any moves in the current code — these appear to be stale entries from a previous version.
